'''Debret Nightmoon''' was a female [[Human/Legends|Human]] smuggler who worked as a courier with her ship, a [[Starfeld Industries/Legends|Starfeld Industries]] [[Z-10 Seeker-class scout ship|Z-10 Seeker]] named ''[[Starlady]]''.<ref name="ABGTAS" />
